name: 5KH Series High Precision Planetary Gearbox
description: The 5KH series is a high-precision planetary gearbox line designed for applications requiring low backlash, high torque density, and smooth operation. Available in multiple frame sizes and reduction ratios, the series offers robust performance for servo-driven motion control systems.

name: 8/11 Series Harmonic Drive
description: Kofon 8/11 series harmonic drive reducers offering high transmission accuracy, high torsional stiffness, large load capacity, high efficiency, and long life. Available in multiple structural forms (HF, HS, SF, SS) for standalone use with easy installation.

name: KFQ150 AGV Drive Wheel
description: Integrated AGV drive wheel combining a servo motor and high-precision gearmotor in a compact hub-motor design. Features a resin-rubber or polyurethane outer tire layer for high strength and wear resistance, a compact hub reducer structure, and a simple mounting bracket for easy positioning and improved drive precision. Optional matching driver available.

name: AGV Steering & Differential Wheel
description: AGV steering and differential wheels from Kofon, featuring a planetary gear structure inside the wheel hub. The wheel core uses a planetary gearbox design, offering customizable speed ratios, compact structure, high reliability, and maintenance-free operation. The outer wheel layer uses resin rubber or polyurethane for high strength and wear resistance. The drive wheel integrates travel and steering units, with low-voltage servo motors (48V DC), optional encoders, and both electronic and mechanical limit switches for safe steering control.

name: CaesarPlanetary
description: High-precision inline planetary gearboxes for servo-driven motion. Available in three frame sizes (60, 90, 140 mm) and ratios from 3:1 to 100:1. Low-backlash (HP) and high-torque (HT) variants share a common mounting interface so a customer can step up torque without redesigning the bracket.

name: KBD-MC Series Harmonic Drive
description: KBD-MC series harmonic drive reducers from Kofon. Ultra-short design with high transmission accuracy, high torsional stiffness, large load capacity, high efficiency, and long life. Available in frame sizes 14, 17, 20, 25, and 32 with various reduction ratios.

name: KCD-MC Series Harmonic Drive / Strain Wave Gearbox
description: KCD-MC series harmonic drive reducers from Kofon. Features ultra-short component design, high transmission accuracy and repeatability, high torsional stiffness, large load capacity, high efficiency, and long service life. Available in frame sizes 14, 17, 20, 25, and 32 with various reduction ratios.

name: KFDG Series Direct-Coupled Electric Cylinder
description: KFDG series direct-coupled electric cylinders integrate a servo motor, servo drive, and high-precision ball screw in a modular design. The servo motor connects directly to the transmission screw, eliminating intermediate inertia and backlash for improved control precision. Available in frame sizes 50, 60, 70, 80, 100, and 120 mm, with multiple lead options per frame. Suitable for harsh environments, offering high strength, high speed, high precision, smooth motion, and low noise. Thrust range from 1.5 kN to 30 kN, speeds up to 500 mm/s (1 m/s with special screws), and strokes up to 1 m.

name: KGR Series
description: KGR series hypoid right-angle gearboxes from Kofon. Available in 1-stage and 2-stage configurations with ratios from 3:1 to 100:1. Features high precision (backlash ≤4 arcmin), high torque density, tapered roller bearings for high overturning moment capacity, and IP65 protection. Suitable for servo motor applications requiring compact right-angle power transmission.

name: Kofon Precision Ball Screw
description: Kofon precision ball screw series. High-efficiency (≥90%) rolling-element linear actuator converting rotary to linear motion (or vice versa) with low friction, high positioning accuracy, high rigidity (via preload), high speed capability, and long service life. Available in multiple screw diameters (16–63 mm) and leads (4–10 mm) with various ball diameters and circuit configurations.

name: KPX-S Series Hand-Input Reducer
description: The KPX-S series hand-input (manual crank) planetary reducers from Kofon are designed for applications where electric power may be unavailable or unreliable. They allow manual operation via a hand crank to maintain essential equipment function during power failures or in remote locations. The series features high efficiency (up to 97% for 1-stage), low backlash options, and a compact design. Available in 1-stage and 2-stage configurations with a wide range of ratios.

name: KPX-S Series Hand-Crank Input Reducer
description: The KPX-S series is a hand-crank input planetary gearbox designed for manual backup operation when electrical power is unavailable. It ensures equipment can continue running in remote areas or emergency situations. Available in 1-stage and 2-stage configurations with a wide range of ratios, offering high reliability, simple operation, and standard backlash options.

name: KPX-SY Series Hand-Input Gearbox
description: The KPX-SY series is a hand-input (manual crank) planetary gearbox designed for applications where electric power is unavailable or unreliable. It provides a reliable mechanical backup in remote areas or emergency situations. Available in 1-stage and 2-stage configurations with a wide range of ratios, offering high efficiency, low backlash, and compact dimensions.

name: K-R Series Hypoid Right-Angle Gearbox
description: K-R series hypoid right-angle gearboxes from Kofon, featuring high precision (backlash ≤5 arcmin), high efficiency (up to 96%), and compact design. Available in 1-stage and 2-stage configurations with ratios from 3 to 100. Suitable for servo motor integration with customizable output dimensions.

name: KTFR1 Series Planetary Gearbox
description: KTFR1 series precision planetary gearboxes from Kofon. Features top-grade spiral bevel gears with optimized design for uniform tooth contact load and high torque output. Integrated aluminum alloy housing ensures maximum rigidity and corrosion resistance. Gears are made of high-strength carburized alloy steel ground to ISO Grade 6 precision. Available in frame sizes KT070 through KT240, with single, double, and triple stage configurations offering ratios from 1:1 to 100:1. Suitable for precision servo applications with low backlash and high efficiency.

name: PL型拧紧机 (PL Tightening Machine)
description: PL series tightening machines integrate advanced wear-resistant materials with planetary gear trains for high-speed wear resistance and noise reduction. Features include customized gear trains with profile modification and tooth optimization for improved impact resistance, special bearing designs to withstand multi-directional loads under tightening impacts, optional built-in torque and displacement sensors for torque visualization, self-lubricating bearings in compact spaces under high impact, and high-strength special-material output shafts with heat treatment for impact and wear resistance.

name: PWHZ Rotary Planetary Gearbox
description: PWHZ series rotary planetary gearboxes are designed for slewing applications in hydraulic truck cranes, crawler cranes, railway cranes, ship decks, docks, and container handling. Features include same-direction input/output rotation, easy installation and oil change, low-noise operation, modular high-strength planetary gearing, and 1–3 stage configurations. A wet multi-disc brake (normally closed) is integrated. The motor is not included.

name: PWJY Series
description: PWJY series planetary gearboxes from Kofon, featuring an integrated planetary gear structure with high efficiency and stable performance. They include a high-strength alloy steel roller (surface can be rubber-coated), an efficient electromagnetic brake for direct braking of the power shaft, smart sensors for remote monitoring, and an integrated cast support frame. Designed for horizontal installation with industrial gear oil lubrication.

name: PWZD Series Planetary Gearbox
description: PWZD series planetary gearboxes are heavy-duty drives designed for tunnel boring, pipe jacking, and other non-excavation construction machinery. They feature carburized and ground sun/planet gears, nitrided ring gears, a motor-direct input design, and German-standard internal spline outputs. The housing is ultra-compact for confined spaces, and the load capacity exceeds that of standard planetary gearboxes by over 20%.

name: PWZQ Hub-Mounted Planetary Gearbox
description: PWZQ series hub-mounted (wheel-specific) planetary gearboxes from Kofon. Designed for direct wheel/drive integration in mobile machinery and AGV applications. The page provides an overview of the series but does not include detailed technical specifications (torque, ratio, backlash, etc.) for individual models.

name: R060 Series
description: The R060 series is a compact precision planetary gearbox from Kofon's R-series line, available in 1-stage, 2-stage, and 3-stage configurations. It offers ratios from 3:1 to 320:1, rated torques up to 35 Nm, backlash as low as 8 arcmin (1-stage), and IP65 protection. Suitable for general-purpose precision motion control applications.

name: R Series
description: General-purpose inline planetary gearbox family. Available in 1-, 2-, and 3-stage configurations with reduction ratios from 3:1 through 320:1. Grease-lubricated, IP65, with a -25 to +90 °C operating range and 20 000 h rated lifetime. Lower torque-density than the high-precision CaesarPlanetary line, but suitable across a broad set of motion-control use cases.

name: RD Series — Compact Multi-Axis Integrated Servo Drive
description: The RD Series is a compact multi-axis integrated servo drive from Kofon. It supports 2 to 6 servo axes in a single housing, reducing installation space by up to 30% compared to equivalent discrete configurations. Features include dynamic braking, vibration suppression, integrated safety functions, and a user-friendly tuning software with auto stiffness control and system parameter identification. Available in 220V and 380V variants with per-axis rated output currents from 2.0 to 35.0 Arms.

name: Servo Linear Joint Module
description: Servo linear joint modules driven by a motor, transmitting power through a planetary roller screw to achieve precise linear motion. Sensors monitor the joint's motion state in real time and feed back to the control system for accuracy. Available in four thrust/speed/size variants with DC48V power, 3mm lead, and customizable options.

name: TKZ Series Tightening Gearbox
description: TKZ series tightening gearboxes (拧紧机) integrate advanced wear-resistant materials with planetary gear trains for high-speed wear resistance and noise reduction. They feature customized gear profiles with tooth optimization for improved impact resistance, special bearings designed to withstand multi-directional loads under tightening shocks, and can accommodate built-in torque and displacement sensors for torque visualization. The output shaft uses high-strength special materials with appropriate heat treatment for enhanced impact resistance and wear resistance.

name: TL Series
description: TL offset-type tightening machine gearbox series. Integrates advanced wear-resistant materials with planetary gear trains for high-speed wear resistance and noise reduction. Features customized gear trains with profile modification and tooth optimization for improved impact resistance, special bearing designs to withstand multi-directional loads under tightening shocks, and optional built-in torque and displacement sensors for torque visualization. Output shaft uses high-strength special materials with heat treatment for impact and wear resistance.

name: W8 Micro Gearbox
description: W8 micro planetary gearbox series from Kofon. Designed for low-speed, high-torque applications in small spaces such as humanoid robot joints and drones. Features hardened gear hobbing, integrated front-flange ring gear, high torque, impact resistance, low noise, and grease lubrication (maintenance-free). Available in frame sizes 08/10/12/16/19/22/26/32 with single, double, triple, and quadruple stage configurations.

name: XAM Series
description: XAM series servo motors feature 5-pole-pair, low cogging torque design. Used with RD series servo drives to form a powerful, high-performance servo system. Power range 0.05 kW to 2 kW, flange sizes 60 mm to 130 mm, with multiple inertia and speed configurations. Available in 48 V, 220 V, and 380 V voltage grades. Equipped with 23-bit multi-turn absolute optical encoder. IP65 protection, Class F insulation.

name: XGV Series Servo Integrated Drive Wheel
description: XGV series servo integrated drive wheels adopt an integrated design concept, highly integrating the driver, encoder, brake, motor and reducer into one coaxial unit. The motor and reducer are coaxially integrated to ensure precision and stability during operation. High-performance servo motors paired with high-reliability precision planetary reducers achieve long life and high precision retention. Available in 500W, 750W, 1000W and 1500W power variants with wheel diameters of 150mm or 180mm.

name: ZF-S Series
description: ZF-S two-stage planetary gearbox series, designed for machine tool spindle drives. Suitable for lathes (horizontal B5) and vertical machining centers (vertical V1), excelling in low-speed high-torque applications. Features coaxial output, helical gear design for low noise, low backlash, high radial load capacity, and 24V DC shift-by-wire actuation. Available in four frame sizes: 2S250, 2S300, 2S450, 2S600.
